templates.reading: Its stroke count of {number} is {rating}, signifying {theme}.

themes.1: the seed of all things, a bright and fortunate beginning full of promise
themes.2: division and instability that scatter early effort
themes.3: lively growth and creative expression that bring recognition
themes.4: hardship and setback that undermine steady plans
themes.5: balance and good health crowning patient, honest work
themes.6: inherited blessings and a generous, prosperous household
themes.7: firm willpower that overcomes obstacles through independence
themes.8: persevering effort that breaks through to solid advancement
themes.9: brilliance shadowed by reversal and the risk of loss
themes.10: emptiness and a downturn that swallow early gains
themes.11: renewal and orderly prosperity rising like fresh shoots
themes.12: weak resources straining ambition beyond its means
themes.13: wisdom and skill that lead capably and win trust
themes.14: scattered fortunes and lonely struggle against the tide
themes.15: warmth, esteem, and rounded good fortune in every sphere
themes.16: a magnanimous nature drawing support and rising leadership
themes.17: strong resolve that pushes through if pride is kept in check
themes.18: capable ambition that succeeds when stubbornness is softened
themes.19: talent undercut by obstacles and reversals at the peak
themes.20: instability and hollow effort that wear down vitality
themes.21: dignified leadership and self-made standing won step by step
themes.22: frustration and frailty that interrupt a promising course
themes.23: rising vitality and brilliant advancement to a commanding place
themes.24: resourcefulness that builds wealth from modest beginnings
themes.25: sharp ability that prospers when tact tempers a strong tongue
themes.26: a heroic but turbulent path marked by dramatic ups and downs
themes.27: keen drive that succeeds early yet risks criticism and excess
themes.28: hardship and separation testing an otherwise able nature
themes.29: ample capacity and gain, though desire must be governed
themes.30: a gambler's fortune swinging between great win and loss
themes.31: integrity and ability that mature into lasting success
themes.32: unexpected goodwill and good timing that lift fortunes high
themes.33: vigorous brilliance and rising esteem, powerful but intense
themes.34: hidden trouble and upheaval breaking an outwardly fair course
themes.35: gentle, steady fortune well suited to craft and scholarship
themes.36: a chivalrous but stormy life of trials borne for others
themes.37: honest authority and resolve that earn wide trust and success
themes.38: modest artistic talent that flourishes with steady application
themes.39: abundant fortune and influence crowning long perseverance
themes.40: daring ability shadowed by recklessness and shifting repute
themes.41: high capability and renown built on virtue and resolve
themes.42: versatile talent spread thin, needing focus to bear fruit
themes.43: outward show masking inner strain and unsteady resources
themes.44: ruin and obstruction that undo effort despite cleverness
themes.45: clear insight and smooth progress toward far-reaching plans
themes.46: trials and instability that burden a well-meaning nature
themes.47: blossoming fortune and goodwill yielding lasting reward
themes.48: wisdom and counsel that bring esteem and dependable gain
themes.49: a turning fortune poised between fair and foul outcomes
themes.50: one rise followed by decline as success slips away
themes.51: alternating fortune that prospers then wanes by turns
themes.52: foresight and enterprise that achieve ambitious designs
themes.53: outward ease concealing inner want and hidden reversals
themes.54: compounded hardship and loss that wear down resolve
themes.55: surface prosperity hiding strain, righted only by patience
themes.56: faltering will and want of means that stall good intentions
themes.57: resilience that meets adversity and emerges the stronger
themes.58: late fortune won after early hardship and reversal
themes.59: irresolution and loss of nerve that squander opportunity
themes.60: aimlessness and instability adrift without firm direction
themes.61: prosperity and repute that reward a disciplined character
themes.62: declining vitality and weakened ties that invite setback
themes.63: flourishing fortune and contentment crowning honest effort
themes.64: upheaval and scattering that break a hopeful course
themes.65: rising esteem and lasting prosperity through open-handed virtue
themes.66: discord and loss straining both household and standing
themes.67: smooth progress and supportive ties opening the way forward
themes.68: ingenuity and diligence that earn steady, well-founded gain
themes.69: instability and strain that erode strength and resolve
themes.70: emptiness and hardship overshadowing late fortune
themes.71: capable promise weakened by hesitancy, righted by resolve
themes.72: outward comfort masking hidden loss and instability
themes.73: easygoing fortune, modest but secure if ambition stays humble
themes.74: aimless effort and waste that yield little for much toil
themes.75: fair prospects that thrive only with patience and restraint
themes.76: depletion and discord that break an over-stretched course
themes.77: fortune fair at first then turning to hardship midway
themes.78: middling fortune dimming toward want in the later years
themes.79: spent vitality and lost repute that leave effort barren
themes.80: hardship and retreat best met by caution and withdrawal
themes.81: a return to the One, renewal and crowning good fortune
